problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
